testcase.name: tc01_verifyOtp_correctOtp_shouldReturn200

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <200> but was <400>.

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: tc02_verifyOtp_wrongOtp_shouldNotReturn200
tc03_verifyOtp_nonNumericOtp_shouldReturn400Or422
tc04_verifyOtp_emptyOtp_shouldReturn400Or422
tc05_verifyOtp_emptyBody_shouldReturn400Or422

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code (is <400> or is <422>) but was <405>.

testcase.failure:
